title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Lake Dallas ISD (Denton County) ~4,000 students. No dedicated ECE director; PreK routed through C&I. Asst Supt of C&I oversees PreK and elementary curriculum. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying). Email format firstinitial+lastname@ldisd.net standard pattern. Dr. Edi Schwartz is Supt. PreK at Shady Shores Elementary.

title: Associate Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction and Accountability
notes: CFISD is 3rd largest district in Texas (~117,000 students). Linda Macias oversees C&I including Early Childhood. Director of Early Childhood role exists - Tiffany Sutton has held similar role. Email format firstname.lastname@cfisd.net confirmed. Dr. Doug Killian is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK at multiple elementary campuses; significant HB 1605 implementation in progress. Major HMH/Bluebonnet adoption discussions.

title: Director of Early Learning
notes: Klein ISD (Harris County) ~53,000 students. Has dedicated Early Learning department. Shanna Allbright serves as Director of Early Learning. Email format firstinitial+lastname@kleinisd.net standard. Dr. Jenny McGown is Supt. HB 3 full-day Pre-K at all elementary campuses. Multiple PreK partnership programs. Active HB 1605 review.

title: Deputy Superintendent (oversees Curriculum & Early Learning)
notes: Lewisville ISD ~50,000 students; serves multiple cities (Lewisville, Flower Mound, Highland Village). Early Childhood routed through C&I. Coordinator/Director of Early Learning role under Lori Rapp. Email format lastname+firstinitial@lisd.net (rappl@lisd.net) confirmed for many staff. Dr. Lori Rapp serves as Superintendent as of 2023. HB 3 full-day PreK; HB 1605 active review.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Fort Bend ISD ~80,000 students (Sugar Land area). Has dedicated Early Childhood department. Email format firstname.lastname@fortbendisd.com is current pattern (district uses fortbendisd.com primarily, fortbend.k12.tx.us legacy). Dr. Marc Smith is Supt. Diane Cook is Chief Academic Officer / Asst Supt T&L. HB 3 full-day PreK widespread; dual-language programs. Major HB 1605 implementation discussions 2024-25.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Spring ISD (north Harris County) ~33,000 students. Has dedicated Early Childhood department; multiple EC campuses (Bammel ECC, Beneke ECC, etc.). Email format firstinitial+lastname@springisd.org standard. Dr. Lupita Hinojosa is Supt (since 2022). HB 3 full-day PreK at dedicated Early Childhood Centers. High ED enrollment. Active Reading Academies implementation.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Conroe ISD (Montgomery County) ~70,000 students, fast-growing. Dr. Chris Hines is Deputy Supt C&I overseeing Early Childhood. Director of Curriculum elementary level also relevant - Jennifer Norman has held that role. Email format firstinitial+lastname@conroeisd.net standard. Dr. Curtis Null is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK with significant expansion. New ECE classroom additions due to growth.

title: Chief Academic Officer / Asst Supt of Curriculum
notes: Clint ISD (El Paso County, border district) ~10,000 students. Has Early Childhood programs; PreK at multiple elementary campuses. Email format firstinitial+lastname@clintweb.net standard pattern. Dr. Juan Martinez is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; dual-language programs heavily emphasized. Reading Academies implementation. Federal Title I funding supports ECE.

title: Superintendent
notes: London ISD (Nueces County, suburban Corpus Christi) ~1,800 students. Very small district; no dedicated ECE staff. Superintendent oversees academics directly. Half-day Pre-K (qualifying program). Email format firstinitial+lastname@londonisd.net inferred from staff directory pattern. PK at London Elementary. Reading Academies completed K-3.

title: Executive Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: PSJA ISD (Hidalgo County, Rio Grande Valley) ~31,000 students. Has dedicated Early Childhood department; nationally recognized PreK programs. Has multiple Pre-K Academies. Email format firstname.lastname@psjaisd.us standard. Dr. Alejandro Elias is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK 3 and PreK 4; bilingual/dual-language focus. Active HB 1605 work; Reading Academies completed. PreK-3 expansion through ARPA funds.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Weslaco ISD (Hidalgo County, RGV) ~17,000 students. Has dedicated Early Childhood/Pre-K department. Email format firstname.lastname@wisd.us standard. Dr. Richard Rivera is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK 3 and PreK 4; dual language. Reading Academies completed K-3. Title I and state PreK funding supports ECE programs.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment
notes: Frenship ISD (Lubbock County, Wolfforth) ~10,500 students; fast-growing west Lubbock suburban district. PreK routed through C&I. Email format firstname.lastname@frenship.us standard (district uses frenship.us domain for staff email, .net legacy). Dr. Michelle McCord serves as Asst Supt C&I. Dr. Michelle Wood is Supt as of 2024-25. HB 3 full-day PreK; Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Nueces Canyon CISD (Edwards County, Barksdale/Camp Wood) very small rural district ~250 students. No dedicated ECE staff; Superintendent oversees curriculum directly. Half-day Pre-K only. Email format firstinitial+lastname@nccisd.net inferred. K-12 single-campus structure.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Teaching & Learning
notes: Waco ISD (McLennan County) ~13,500 students. Director of Early Childhood role exists - historically Patti Carrillo / Veronica Brown. Asst Supt T&L oversees ECE. Email format firstname.lastname@wacoisd.org standard. Dr. Susan Kincannon is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; Title I high. PreK at multiple Title I elementary campuses. Significant Reading Academies investment. Considered for HB 1605 Bluebonnet adoption.

title: Superintendent
notes: Lindale ISD (Smith County, east of Tyler) ~4,500 students. Suburban/rural. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE director. Asst Supt of Curriculum (Tonya Knowlton or successor) handles PreK. Email format firstname+lastname@lisdeagles.net common pattern (district uses lisdeagles.net for email, lindaleeagles.org website). Half-day Pre-K. PreK at College Street Elementary / Velma Penny.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Port Arthur ISD (Jefferson County, Gulf Coast) ~7,500 students. PreK routed through C&I. Has Early Childhood Center / dedicated PreK programs. Email format firstinitial+lastname@paisd.org standard. Dr. Mark Porterie is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; high ED, Title I. Reading Academies completed. Hurricane Harvey recovery shaped facility investments.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Belton ISD (Bell County, central TX, near Fort Hood) ~13,500 students, fast-growing. PreK routed through C&I. Email format firstinitial+lastname@bisd.net standard. Dr. Matt Smith is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; multiple new elementary campuses opened due to growth. Reading Academies completed. New ECE/elementary buildings reflect rapid growth in Belton/Temple corridor.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Schools and Innovation (oversees Early Learning)
notes: Leander ISD (Williamson/Travis County, Austin suburb) ~42,000 students, fast-growing. Director of Early Childhood role under Curriculum - Bailey Strickland has held similar. Email format firstname.lastname@leanderisd.org standard. Dr. Bruce Gearing is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK across multiple campuses; new elementary openings due to growth. Reading Academies completed. HB 1605 review active.

title: Chief Academic Officer / Asst Supt of Learning & Innovation
notes: Lake Travis ISD (Travis County, west Austin) ~12,000 students, affluent suburban. Director of Early Childhood/PreK role under Learning & Innovation. Email format firstname.lastname@ltisdschools.org standard. Dr. Paul Norton is Supt. Tuition-based PreK programs in addition to qualifying program. Reading Academies completed. Active HB 1605 adoption discussions.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: New Braunfels ISD (Comal County, central TX between Austin/San Antonio) ~9,500 students, growing. PreK routed through C&I. Director of Elementary Curriculum/ECE under Asst Supt. Email format firstname.lastname@nbisd.org standard. Dr. Cade Smith is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; new elementary campuses recently opened. Bilingual/dual language programs.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: North East ISD (Bexar County, San Antonio area) ~58,000 students. Has dedicated Early Childhood department; multiple PreK campuses. Email format firstinitial+lastname@neisd.net standard. Dr. Sean Maika is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK 3 and PreK 4 widespread; multiple early childhood centers. Significant HB 1605 implementation work. Dual-language PreK programs.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Medina Valley ISD (Medina County, west San Antonio area) ~6,500 students, growing rural-suburban. PreK routed through C&I. Email format firstinitial+lastname@mvisd.com standard. Dr. Kenneth Rohrbach is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK for qualifying students. New elementary campuses opening due to growth. Reading Academies completed.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Teaching, Learning & Innovation
notes: College Station ISD (Brazos County, home of Texas A&M) ~14,500 students, fast-growing. PreK routed through T&L. Director of Elementary Curriculum oversees ECE. Email format firstname.lastname@csisd.org standard. Dr. Tim Harkrider is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK at multiple campuses. New elementary openings due to A&M area growth. Reading Academies completed.

title: Asst Supt of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Texas City ISD (Galveston County, Gulf Coast) ~6,000 students. PreK routed through C&I. Has dedicated PreK programs at elementary campuses. Email format firstinitial+lastname@tcisd.org standard. Dr. Melissa Duarte is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK; Title I support. Hurricane Harvey recovery affected facilities. Reading Academies completed.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Angleton ISD (Brazoria County, Gulf Coast) ~6,800 students. PreK routed through C&I. Email format firstinitial+lastname@angletonisd.net standard. Dr. Kimberly Dryden is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK at qualifying campuses. Reading Academies completed K-3.

title: Superintendent
notes: Bay City ISD (Matagorda County, Gulf Coast) ~3,400 students. Smaller rural-suburban district. Superintendent oversees overall academics; Asst Supt of Curriculum handles PreK. Email format lastname+firstinitial@bcblackcats.net pattern. Half-day Pre-K with HB 3 full-day expansion at qualifying campuses. Tenaska/Roy Lawrence is Asst Supt area. Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Matagorda ISD (Matagorda County, Gulf Coast) very small rural district ~120 students. Superintendent oversees all academics directly. No dedicated ECE staff. Half-day Pre-K only. Email format firstinitial+lastname@matagordaisd.org inferred. K-8 only district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Yorktown ISD (DeWitt County, south TX, between San Antonio and Victoria) small rural district ~450 students. Superintendent oversees academics directly. No dedicated ECE staff. Half-day Pre-K. Email format firstinitial+lastname@yisd.org inferred from staff. Single campus structure (Yorktown Elementary + Junior/Senior High).

title: Assistant Superintendent of Educational Services
notes: Gregory-Portland ISD (San Patricio County, north of Corpus Christi) ~4,500 students. PreK routed through Educational Services. Email format firstname.lastname@g-pisd.org standard. Dr. Michelle Cavazos served as Supt - confirm current title. Dr. Paul Clore is current Supt. Asst Supt of Curriculum handles ECE. Half-day Pre-K with HB 3 full-day for qualifying. Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Crystal City ISD (Zavala County, south TX) small rural district ~1,800 students, high ED, predominantly Hispanic. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE director. Asst Supt of Curriculum role exists. Email format firstinitial+lastname@crystalcityisd.org inferred. HB 3 full-day PreK for qualifying students. Bilingual/dual-language emphasis. Title I supports ECE programs.

title: Superintendent
notes: Comfort ISD (Kendall County, west of San Antonio) small rural district ~1,200 students. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE staff. Email format firstinitial+lastname@comfort.txed.net inferred (district uses txed.net which is region 20 ESC managed domain). Half-day Pre-K. Director of Curriculum role under Supt.

title: Superintendent
notes: Gladewater ISD (Gregg County, east TX) small district ~1,750 students. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE director. Asst Supt of Curriculum handles PreK. Email format firstinitial+lastname@gladewaterisd.com inferred. Half-day Pre-K with HB 3 full-day for qualifying. PreK at Weldon Elementary. Title I supports.

title: Superintendent
notes: Mount Pleasant ISD (Titus County, NE TX) ~5,700 students, predominantly Hispanic. Superintendent oversees academics; Asst Supt of Curriculum (Stacey Smith or successor) handles PreK. Email format firstinitial+lastname@mpisd.net standard. Mount Pleasant Early Childhood Center is dedicated PreK campus. HB 3 full-day PreK. Bilingual programs. Reading Academies completed.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Lufkin ISD (Angelina County, east TX/Piney Woods) ~7,800 students. PreK routed through C&I. Has Pre-K Academy / early childhood programming. Email format firstinitial+lastname@lufkinisd.org standard. Lynn Hill / Lynn Torres has held Asst Supt C&I role. Dr. Lynn Torres is Supt as of recent. HB 3 full-day PreK; Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Crockett County CCSD (Ozona, west TX) very small rural district ~600 students - covers entire Crockett County. Superintendent oversees all academics. No dedicated ECE director. Half-day Pre-K only. Email format firstinitial+lastname@ozonaschools.net inferred. Single-campus structure.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Corsicana ISD (Navarro County, central TX south of Dallas) ~6,200 students. PreK routed through C&I. Email format firstinitial+lastname@cisd.org standard. Dr. Diane Frost is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK at qualifying campuses. Title I supports ECE. Reading Academies completed. PreK at Sam Houston Elementary and other campuses.

title: Superintendent
notes: Palmer ISD (Ellis County, southeast of Dallas) small rural-suburban district ~1,300 students. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE director. Email format firstinitial+lastname@palmer-isd.org inferred. Half-day Pre-K. PreK at Palmer Elementary. Reading Academies completed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Hubbard ISD (Hill County, central TX) very small rural district ~350 students. Superintendent oversees all academics directly. No dedicated ECE staff. Half-day Pre-K. Email format firstinitial+lastname@hubbardisd.net inferred. K-12 single campus structure.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Crowley ISD (Tarrant County, south Fort Worth suburb) ~15,000 students. PreK routed through C&I. Director of Early Childhood / Elementary Curriculum role under Asst Supt. Email format firstname.lastname@crowleyisdtx.org standard. Dr. Michael McFarland is Supt. HB 3 full-day PreK at multiple campuses. Reading Academies completed. Active HB 1605 review.

title: Superintendent
notes: Academy ISD (Bell County, central TX between Temple and Belton) small district ~1,700 students. Superintendent oversees academics; no dedicated ECE director. Email format firstinitial+lastname@academyisd.net inferred. Half-day Pre-K. PK at Academy Elementary. Reading Academies completed.
